response:
Hello Team,  
Thank you for your time in our session.  
During our session, we successfully rolled back the change that was performed this AM, when the issue was occurring.  
Testing was conducted and confirmed that the GP connection(s) are functioning as expected.  
In addition to the rollback change, the team also implemented push configuration changes to PA-5450s DG and RNs.  
These changes were confirmed to be successful and functioning as intended.
